displayTitle: Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire
synopsis: "Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire" is a short story written by Michael Mikaelian, featured in Star Wars Galaxy #3 which was published by The Topps Company, Inc. in Spring 1995. The story was also available online at Hyperspace. It takes place in 4 ABY, sometime after the Battle of Saijo. Besides the main story, Dark Star also contains much of the title character's backstory, which can be found in her article.
title: Lumiya: Dark Star of the Empire
